calendar.matters:
Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgment Of Order For The Deposit Of Money Into Structured Settlement
Off Calendar May-16-2016 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Approve Compromise Of Claim
Off Calendar Feb-23-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Peter Henry Liederman, Esq., specially appearing with Petitioner Karen Herrarte, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Adriel Herrarte present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $100,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $25,000.00 payable to Law Firm of Razi Law Group
Costs: $10,178.74
A net balance of $65,039.26 to be used to fund a structured settlement at:
Pacific Life and Annuity Services, Inc. until:
2/9/2023 with a Guaranteed Lump Sum of $15,000.00,
2/9/2026 with a Guaranteed Lump Sum of $25,000.00, and
2/9/2030 with a Guaranteed Lump Sum of $49,865.00.

Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into a structured settlement.
Status Hearing Scheduled on May 26, 2016 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into be used to fund a structured settlement.
No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Dept. 514 prior to Hearing.

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Approve Compromise Of Claim
Off Calendar Dec-22-2015 Continued To Feb-23-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
